summary: 只读复核 R2 修复提交 9db67e04 与 R2 handoff 提交 558d412e。R1 阻断项已修复：pnpm check 与 @monsoon/sim-ai typecheck 均通过，maxTraceCandidates 不再显式传入 undefined，未使用 type alias 已移除。R2 增加了 payload-level command parity evidence：非 system AI 命令与非 system player template 的 kind/payload 相等，actor、commandId、expectedDay、expectedRevision 保持运行时重写；system support commands 独立白名单为 sim.advance-day 与 sim.record-legitimacy-source，不混入 AI/player parity。未发现 forbidden path、新依赖、telemetry/server/manual node battle/runtime script engine、直接 WorldState mutation 或新增非确定性。

Unused _CommandParityCompileCheck no longer exists; remaining maxTraceCandidates match is inside a conditional spread that only includes the property when defined.
After writing this systems R2 handoff, the only uncommitted path reported was project/messages/outbox/M6-LAYERED-AI-001__MSG-20260627-M6-LAYERED-AI-SYSTEMS-R2-REVIEW__systems_architect.json.

decisions: ACCEPT: R1 lint/typecheck blockers are resolved and reviewer reran the relevant gates successfully.
ACCEPT: optional maxTraceCandidates construction now preserves exactOptionalPropertyTypes semantics by omitting the property when undefined.

ACCEPT: payload-level command parity evidence is sufficient for this task because non-system AI commands are compared against non-system player templates by kind and payload, while runtime-only fields remain intentionally rewritten.
ACCEPT: system support commands are separated from AI/player parity and constrained to the reviewed scheduler/legitimacy support command kinds.
ACCEPT: implementation still stays in sim-ai/tests plus allowed project handoff metadata, with no save-format/client/content/tools/docs forbidden path changes and no new dependency.
risks: An initial pre-review git status observed transient uncommitted route/goal-mode metadata, but final status after this handoff only reported the new systems R2 review handoff file. Lead should still run normal integration status checks before acceptance.

The trace type remains sim-ai-local rather than protocol DTO. This is acceptable for M6-LAYERED-AI-001 because the task requires bounded reason traces, not cross-package trace transport; later batch/dashboard tasks should promote trace shape only if they need protocol-visible consumption.

Payload comparison uses JSON.stringify on command payloads for validation evidence only, not for authoritative simulation decisions. This is acceptable here because payloads are explicit DTOs and the comparison does not determine WorldState mutation.
requested_action: Lead may proceed with M6-LAYERED-AI-001 acceptance/integration gates for HEAD 558d412e after normal status/diff checks. Do not mark CLOSED solely from this handoff; perform normal lead integration and task state transitions.
